predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof of possessing Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally considered a foreigner.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: covered_by_community_law_on_free_movement
predicates.description: The person is covered by Community law on free movement.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is legally considered a third-country national.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: meets_conditions_for_access_or_stay
predicates.description: The person meets the conditions for access to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: is_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person is legally considered to be in an illegal stay.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_dublin_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the member state responsible for an international protection request.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_document_passport_or_id
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

predicates.name: recognized_by_national_authorities_for_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person is recognized as a national by their country's authorities who agreed to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_ministerial_laissez_passer_nationality
predicates.description: The person falls under a category of nationalities for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally considered an identified foreigner.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person's circumstances has been performed.

predicates.name: filed_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_stay
predicates.description: The person filed a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay.

predicates.name: filed_international_protection_request_in_time
predicates.description: The person filed their request for international protection within the legally foreseen time limit.

predicates.name: used_false_info_or_fraud_in_procedures
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information, false documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in relevant procedures.

predicates.name: cooperates_with_authorities_on_access_stay_removal
predicates.description: The person cooperates with authorities regarding access, stay, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: refuses_or_fails_to_comply_with_listed_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they will not comply or has already failed to comply with a listed transfer, return, removal, or restrictive measure.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom_or_member_state
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another member state that is neither lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_refusal_or_removal
predicates.description: The person filed a new application immediately after a refusal of entry/stay or a removal measure.

predicates.name: hid_fingerprints_given_in_other_dublin_state
predicates.description: The person hid having given fingerprints in another Dublin state after filing an international protection request.

predicates.name: filed_multiple_unsuccessful_applications_in_kingdom_or_member_states
predicates.description: The person filed multiple unsuccessful international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states.

predicates.name: hid_previous_international_protection_request_in_other_dublin_state
predicates.description: The person hid having previously filed an international protection request in another Dublin state.

predicates.name: came_to_kingdom_for_other_purposes_than_applied_for
predicates.description: The person stated or their file shows they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they applied.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine for filing a manifestly unlawful appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: meets_at_least_one_absconding_criterion
predicates.description: The person meets at least one of the objective criteria for the risk of absconding.

predicates.name: has_risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: The person is legally considered to have a risk of absconding.
